### Parser

- **Name:**
- **Repo / homepage:**
- **License:**
- **Open source?** (required — this benchmark only compares open-source parsers)

### How to run it

- **Install (one-liner):**
- **CLI command** to convert a PDF to Markdown:
- **Output location / format:**
- **Any install gotchas?** (missing deps, model downloads, GPU expectations)

### Why add it?

What does this parser do better (or differently) than MarkItDown / Docling / Marker / MinerU? Is it faster, more accurate on tables, better at OCR, etc.?

### I can help

- [ ] I can submit a PR wiring it into `scripts/run_benchmark.py`
- [ ] I can provide install notes for `REPRODUCING.md`
- [ ] I just want to suggest it
